news.title: Constellation Brands Generates Strong Free Cash Flow - But is STZ Undervalued?
news.summary: Constellation Brands, which sells Corona and Modelo beers, generated strong fiscal Q1 free cash flow and FCF margins. But investors are wondering if it's undervalued. One play is to sell short OTM puts.

news.title: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Turn Down
news.summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

news.title: The Dow Just Had Its Best First Half Since 2021, but This Jobs Number Is Flashing Yellow
news.summary: The Dow just closed out its best first half since 2021, up 8.7% year-to-date, yet Wednesday’s open felt like a nervous glance at the door.
